data.biography: 柯颖，1998年出生于湖南长沙，毕业于山东艺术学院表演系。芒果娱乐签约艺人。
data.name: 柯颖

data.biography:
Ke Ying is a Chinese actress of Han ethnicity. She was born in Changsha, Hunan Province, China. She is under EE-Media (上海天娱传媒有限公司).

She attended Shandong University of the Arts. In 2019, Ke Ying, who majored in theater performance in her third year of college, decided to sign EE-Media and officially join the industry as an actress.
data.name: Ke Ying

data.biography: Kha Dĩnh sinh năm 1998, là một trong những nữ diễn viên trẻ đầy triển vọng của làng giải trí. Cô sở hữu nhan sắc rạng rỡ với gương mặt thanh tú, làn da trắng mịn và đôi mắt biết nói. Không chỉ gây ấn tượng nhờ vẻ ngoài xinh đẹp, Kha Dĩnh còn chinh phục khán giả bằng lối diễn xuất tự nhiên và khả năng thể hiện tâm lý nhân vật sâu sắc.
data.name: Kha Dĩnh

data.biography: 柯穎，1998 年出生於湖南長沙，畢業於山東藝術學院表演系。芒果娛樂簽約藝人。
data.name: 柯穎

data.biography: Kim Da-hyun (김다현; born May 28, 1998) is a South Korean singer and actress. She is known as a member of the South Korean girl group TWICE. She made her acting debut with You Are The Apple Of My Eye (2024). Dahyun has since starred in the drama film Run To You (2025) and the series Love Me (2025).
data.name: DAHYUN

data.biography:
金多贤（김다현、Kim DaHyun），1998年5月28日出生于韩国京畿道，韩国女歌手，女子演唱组合TWICE成员。

2015年5月5日，出演JYP Entertainment与Mnet共同制作的选拔生存节目《SIXTEEN》，最后胜出比赛并成为TWICE成员；10月20日，发布首张迷你专辑《THE STORY BEGINS》并正式出道。2016年1月21日，获得第30届金唱片大赏唱片部门新人奖。
data.name: 金多贤

data.biography: Kim Da-hyun (김다현; nascida 28 de maio de 1998) é uma cantora e atriz sul-coreana. Mais conhecida por ser integrante do grupo de k-pop TWICE. Ela fez sua estreia como atriz no filme You Are The Apple Of My Eye (2024) e desde então estrelou em outros projetos como o filme Run To You (2025) e a série de k-drama Love Me (2025).
data.name: Kim Da-hyun

data.biography:
金多賢（韓語：김다현／金多賢 Kim Dahyun，英語：Kim Da-Hyun，1998年5月28日—），韓國女歌手，是韓國女子組合TWICE的成員之一，在隊內擔任領饒舌及副唱。

多賢曾因老鷹舞紅極一時。

初中2年級時，參加JYP公司試鏡進入JYP公司。當前也通過SM娛樂和YG娛樂甄選。

2012年7月7日成為JYP練習生，初期跟志效一樣，編入演藝部。

2015年參與Mnet生存實境節目《SIXTEEN》，第三位公開預告的成員，稱號為「定期炸彈 藝能有望主」(시한목탄 예능 유망주）。最終任務中現場觀眾投票獲第五名、Milk Music™投票第五名，並由Minor晉升至Major，成為TWICE的出道成員之一。朴軫永給的評價是「雖然在跳舞、唱歌和Rap都仍有可惜的地方，但總是能神奇地抓住人們的視線，那是訓練或是練習做不到的才能」。
data.name: 金多賢

data.biography:
金多賢（韓語：김다현／金多賢 Kim Dahyun，英語：Kim Da - Hyun，1998 年 5 月 28 日—），韓國女歌手，是韓國女子組合 TWICE 的成員之一，在隊內擔任領饒舌及副唱。

多賢曾因老鷹舞紅極一時。

初中 2 年級時，參加 JYP 公司試鏡進入 JYP 公司。當前也透過 透過 透過 透過 通過 SM 娛樂和 YG 娛樂甄選。

2012 年 7 月 7 日成為 JYP 練習生，初期跟志效一樣，編入演藝部。

2015 年參與 Mnet 生存實境節目《SIXTEEN》，第三位公開預告的成員，稱號為「定期炸彈 藝能有望主」(시한목탄 예능 유망주）。最終任務中現場觀眾投票獲第五名、Milk Music™投票第五名，並由 Minor 晉升至 Major，成為 TWICE 的出道成員之一。樸軫永給的評價是「雖然在跳舞、唱歌和 Rap 都仍有可惜的地方，但總是能神奇地抓住人們的視線，那是訓練或是練習做不到的才能」。
data.name: 金多賢

data.overview: Một sát thủ được CIA huấn luyện chiêu mộ những người tốt nghiệp khác từ chương trình đào tạo bí mật thời thơ ấu của cô, “Chương trình Thực tập”, để tiêu diệt tổ chức bằng bạo lực. CIA chống trả bằng vũ lực chết người.
data.title: Thực Tập

data.biography: Ryota Miura was born on 5 September 1997 in Tokyo, Japan. He is an actor, known for Honeko Akabane's Bodyguards (2024), Love You as the World Ends (2021) and Ienai Himitsu (2024).
data.name: Ryota Miura

data.biography: Shahili Abdan or known by his stage name Namron (born 21 November 1969) is a Malaysian actor, director and screenwriter who is actively involved in theatre, film and television.
data.name: Namron

data.biography: 黄渤，内地演员、导演、歌手，中国电影家协会副主席。毕业于北京电影学院表演系配音专业。黄渤早年曾有过驻唱歌手、舞蹈教练、影视配音等多种工作经历。黄渤不但具有专业的表演素质，在他身上更散发着来自内心的真实与质朴。他曾经做过歌手、节目主持人和舞蹈编导，后来又经过了专业的配音学习，这些丰富的人生经历，使他更具备了优于其他演艺新人的专业素质。
data.name: 黄渤

data.biography: Huang Bo (Chinese: 黄渤; pinyin: Huáng Bó; born 26 August 1974) is a Chinese actor and singer. He was born in Qingdao, Shandong and graduated from Beijing Film Academy.
data.name: Huang Bo

data.biography: 黃渤，內地演員、導演、歌手，中國電影家協會副主席。畢業於北京電影學院表演系配音專業。黃渤早年曾有過駐唱歌手、舞蹈教練、影視配音等多種工作經歷。黃渤不但具有專業的表演素質，在他身上更散發著來自內心的真實與質樸。他曾經做過歌手、節目主持人和舞蹈編導，後來又經過了專業的配音學習，這些豐富的人生經歷，使他更具備了優於其他演藝新人的專業素質。
data.name: 黃渤

data.biography:
Lisa Ann Walter (born August 3, 1963) is an American actress, comedian, and television producer, best known for her roles as Chessy the housekeeper in the romantic comedy film The Parent Trap (1998) and Melissa Schemmenti on the Peabody Award-winning ABC mockumentary sitcom Abbott Elementary (2021–present), for which she received a Screen Actors Guild Award for Outstanding Ensemble in a Comedy Series.

She was formerly the creator and executive producer of Oxygen network reality weight-loss competition series, Dance Your Ass Off. Her other reality television work includes her stint as a judge on ABC's reality television series The Next Best Thing: Who Is the Greatest Celebrity Impersonator?, and as winning celebrity editions of the game shows The Weakest Link and Jeopardy! She also created and starred in the 1996–1997 sitcom, Life's Work, and appeared in such films as Bruce Almighty, Shall We Dance, and War of the Worlds.
data.name: Lisa Ann Walter

data.biography: Lisa Ann Walter (née le 3 août 1963) est une actrice, comédienne, écrivain et productrice de cinéma américaine. Elle a joué dans des films tels que la version 1998 de À nous quatre, Bruce tout-puissant, Shall We Dance et La Guerre des mondes. Lisa Ann Walter a également créé et joué dans la courte sitcom de 1996-1997, Life's Work.

丽莎·安·沃尔特（Lisa Ann Walter，1963年8月3日-），美国女演员、喜剧演员、作家和电影制片人。她曾出演过 1998 年版的《父母陷阱》、《全能布鲁斯》、《我们跳舞吧》和《世界大战》等电影，饰演谢丽尔。沃尔特还创作并主演了 1996-1997 年短命的情景喜剧《Life's Work》。她是 ABC 真人秀电视连续剧《下一个最好的事情：谁是最伟大的名人模仿者》的评委。她还在名人版的《最薄弱的环节》中为她的慈善事业赢得了胜利。
data.name: 丽莎·安·沃尔特

data.biography:
Lisa Ann Walter jest amerykańską aktorką, komikiem i producentką telewizyjną, najbardziej znaną z ról Chessy, gospodyni w komedii romantycznej The Parent Trap (1998) i Melissy Schemmenti w nagrodzonym nagrodą Peabody sitcomie ABC mockumentary Abbott Elementary (2021–nadal), za który otrzymała nagrodę Gildii Aktorów Ekranowych za wybitną obsadę w serialu komediowym.

Była wcześniej twórczynią i producentką wykonawczą reality show o odchudzaniu w sieci Oxygen, Dance Your Ass Off. Jej inne prace w reality show obejmują rolę jurora w reality show ABC The Next Best Thing: Who Is the Greatest Celebrity Impersonator? oraz zwycięskie edycje teleturniejów The Weakest Link i Jeopardy! Była także twórczynią i gwiazdą sitcomu Life's Work z lat 1996–1997, a także wystąpiła w takich filmach, jak Bruce Wszechmogący, Zatańczmy i Wojna światów.

麗莎·安·沃爾特（Lisa Ann Walter，1963 年 8 月 3 日-），美國女演員、喜劇演員、作家和電影製片人。她曾出演過 1998 年版的《父母陷阱》、《全能布魯斯》、《我們跳舞吧》和《強戰世界》等電影，飾演謝麗爾。沃爾特還創作並主演了 1996 - 1997 年短命的情景喜劇《Life's Work》。她是 ABC 真人秀電視聯續劇《下一個最好的事情：誰是最偉大的名人模仿者》的評委。她還在名人版的《最薄弱的環節》中為她的慈善事業贏得了勝利。
data.name: 麗莎·安·沃爾特

data.biography:
Chloë Stevens Sevigny (/ˈsɛvəni/ SEV-ən-ee; born November 18, 1974) is an American actress. Known for her work in independent films, often appearing in controversial or experimental features, Sevigny has received several accolades, including a Golden Globe Award and a nomination for an Academy Award.

After graduating from high school, Sevigny found work as a model and appeared in music videos for Sonic Youth and The Lemonheads, which helped acquire her "it girl" status. In 1995, she made her film debut in Kids and became a prominent performer in the independent film scene throughout the late 1990s, with roles in such films as 1996's Trees Lounge. Sevigny rose to prominence with her portrayal of Lana Tisdel in the drama film Boys Don't Cry (1999), for which she received a nomination for the Academy Award For Best Supporting Actress.

Throughout the 2000s, Sevigny appeared in supporting parts in numerous independent films, including American Psycho (2000), Demonlover(2002), Party Monster and Dogville (both 2003), and The Brown Bunny (2004). Her participation in the latter caused considerable controversy due to a scene in which she performed graphic, unsimulated fellatio. From 2006 to 2011, Sevigny portrayed Nicolette Grant on the HBO series Big Love, for which she won a Golden Globe Award for Best Supporting Actress in 2010. She also appeared in mainstream films such as David Fincher's Zodiac (2007) and starred in numerous television projects, including the British series Hit & Miss (2012), and had supporting roles in Portlandia (2013), two seasons of American Horror Story; and in the Netflix series Bloodline (2015–2017) and Monsters: The Lyle and Erik Menendez Story (2024). 

Sevigny made her directorial debut in 2016 with the short film Kitty. Her third film as a director, White Echo, competed for the Short Film Palme d'Or at the 2019 Cannes Film Festival. She also has a career in fashion design concurrent with her acting work. Over the years, her alternative fashion sense has earned her a reputation as a style icon.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Chloë Sevigny, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Chloë Sevigny

data.biography:
Chloë Stevens Sevigny (* 18. November 1974 in Springfield, Massachusetts) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin und ehemaliges Model.

Sevigny wuchs in der Kleinstadt Darien im US-Bundesstaat Connecticut auf. Ihre Mutter Janine ist Grundschullehrerin, ihr Vater H. David Sevigny († 1996) arbeitete in einem Versicherungsunternehmen und später als Innenraummaler. Sie hat einen älteren Bruder namens Paul, der als DJ in New York City arbeitet. Sevignys Vorfahren mütterlicherseits stammen aus Polen, väterlicherseits ist sie franko-kanadischer Abstammung.

Sie besuchte die Darien High School und war ein eher rebellischer Teenager. Sie rauchte, rasierte sich den Kopf, experimentierte mit Drogen und schwänzte die Schule. Sie sei ein deprimierter Teenager gewesen und habe sich in der spießigen Kleinstadt Darien gelangweilt, erklärte Sevigny diese Phase später. Es zog sie daher immer häufiger nach New York City, wo sie mit den Skatern im Washington Square Park rumhing. Mit 18 Jahren verließ Sevigny schließlich ihr Elternhaus und mietete sich ein Apartment im Stadtteil Brooklyn.

Sevigny begann ihre Karriere als Model. 1993 wurde sie an einem Zeitungsstand im East Village von einer Mode-Redakteurin des US-amerikanischen Sassy-Magazins angesprochen, die so begeistert von Sevignys außergewöhnlichem Kleidungsstil war, dass sie sie für das Magazin als Model vor die Kamera holte. Später arbeitete Sevigny auch als Praktikantin in der Moderedaktion der Zeitschrift.

Einige Monate später wurde Sevigny erneut wegen ihres „Looks“ auf der Straße angesprochen, diesmal von einer Fotografin, die sie für das britische Mode- und Musikmagazin i-D ablichtete. 1994 wurde sie für das Label X-Girl der Sonic-Youth-Frontfrau Kim Gordon gebucht und posierte in einer Modestrecke des Paper-Magazine. Es folgten diverse weitere Modelaufträge u. a. für H&M und die 1996er Frühjahrs- und Sommerkollektion von Miu Miu.

Erste Rollen spielte Sevigny in Musikvideos der Bands Sonic Youth und Lemonheads. Ihr Filmdebüt gab sie 1995 in dem Independent-Drama Kids von Larry Clark. Ihr ehemaliger Lebensgefährte Harmony Korine hatte das Drehbuch zum Film geschrieben und sie dem Regisseur empfohlen. Mit Korine arbeitete sie auch 1997 an Gummo.

Ihren bis dahin größten schauspielerischen Erfolg feierte Sevigny an der Seite von Hilary Swank in Boys Don’t Cry aus dem Jahr 1999. Für ihre Rolle als Lana Tisdel wurde sie sowohl für den Oscar als auch für den Golden Globe nominiert.

Aufsehen erregte 2003 der Film The Brown Bunny, in dem Sevigny Oralverkehr an Vincent Gallo vollzog, was in den USA für Proteste sorgte. 2010 erhielt sie für ihre Nebenrolle als fundamentalistische Mormonin und Ehefrau eines Polygamisten in der Fernsehserie Big Love den Golden Globe Award.

Im Mai 2012 bekam Sevigny die Rolle der Abigail Williams in David Esbjornsons Bühnenstück Abigail/1702, welches vom 27. Juni bis 8. Juli 2012 in New York aufgeführt wurde. Im selben Jahr verkörperte sie außerdem in der britischen Fernsehserie Hit & Miss eine transweibliche Auftragskillerin und gehört seit 2012 zum Ensemble der Horrorserie American Horror Story.

Chloë Stevens Sevigny (Springfield, 18 novembre 1974) è un'attrice e modella statunitense.

Ha ottenuto la fama internazionale per il ruolo di Lana Tisdel in Boys Don't Cry (1999), per il quale è stata candidata ai Golden Globe e agli Oscar come miglior attrice non protagonista. Dal 2006 al 2011 ha interpretato Nicki Grant nella serie televisiva Big Love (2006-2011), vincendo, nel 2010, un Golden Globe per la migliore attrice non protagonista in una serie.  Chloë Sevigny nasce a Springfield, nel Massachusetts, il 18 novembre 1974 da David Sevigny, un contabile statunitense di origini franco-canadesi, e da Janine Malinowski, una casalinga statunitense di origini polacche. La famiglia però si trasferisce a Darien nel Connecticut, dove cresce.

La sua prima apparizione avviene nel video musicale del singolo Sugar Kane, singolo estratto dall'album Dirty degli Sonic Youth. Esordisce nel cinema con il controverso film indipendente Kids di Larry Clark (1995), incentrato su un gruppo di adolescenti alle prese con sesso e droga. Ancora per il cinema indipendente lavora anche in Mosche da bar del 1996, e Gummo di Harmony Korine (1997).

La notorietà arriva nel 1999 grazie al ruolo di Lana, una giovane provinciale innamorata di un ragazzo transgender, Brandon Teena, nel film Boys Don't Cry, che le procura una candidatura sia al premio Oscar alla miglior attrice non protagonista che al Golden Globe. Il successo di Boys Don't Cry le permette di lavorare in produzioni più importanti come American Psycho (2000) e Dogville (2003) di Lars von Trier.

Nel 2003 Cloe Sevigny accetta il ruolo di Daisy nel film The Brown Bunny di Vincent Gallo, suscitando clamore per una scena di sesso orale non simulata con il regista e co-protagonista Gallo.

Dal 2006 la Sevigny è coprotagonista della serie televisiva della HBO, Big Love, che ruota intorno alla storia di una famiglia di poligami, e sempre nello stesso anno in Zodiac, di David Fincher. Nel 2010 recita in My Son, My Son, What Have Ye Done di Werner Herzog, mentre nel 2012 e nel 2015 viene scelta da Ryan Murphy per far parte dell cast della serie antologica American Horror Story, nella seconda stagione American Horror Story: Asylum e nella quinta stagione American Horror Story: Hotel.

Chloë Sevigny è stata anche testimonial per importanti marchi come Louis Vuitton, Miu Miu, H&M e MAC Cosmetics. Attualmente sta lavorando ad una propria linea di abbigliamento e la casa di moda francese Chloé ha annunciato che la Sevigny sarà una delle testimonial per il suo nuovo profumo.

Nel 2016 esordisce alla regia con il cortometraggio Kitty, tratto da un racconto di Paul Bowles. L'anno seguente realizza, per la serie Miu Miu Women's Tales, il cortometraggio Carmen, presentato al Festival di Venezia.

Chloë Stevens Sevigny (18 Kasım 1974 doğumlu) Amerikalı sinema oyuncusu, moda tasarımcısı ve eski modeldir. Sevigny, 1990'ların ortalarında, hem modelleme hem de New York'un moda sahnesinde dikkatini çeken New York'un yeni "it kızı" olarak etiketleyen New York'un Sassy dergisindeki çalışmasıyla geniş moda kariyeriyle tanındı.

Sevigny, ilk filmini tartışmalı Larry Clark filmi Kids'te (1995) başrol oynayarak yaptı ve bu performansıyla Independent Spirit Ödülü'ne aday gösterildi. On yıl boyunca genel olarak iyi karşılanan bağımsız ve genellikle avangard filmlerdeki uzun roller dizisi, Sevigny'nin bağımsız film kraliçesi olarak ününü sağladı. Sevigny, En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu dalında Akademi Ödülü ve Altın Küre adaylığı aldığı Boys Don't Cry'daki ilk ana rolüyle ciddi eleştirel ve ticari tanınırlık kazanması ancak 1999'a kadar sürdü.

Sevigny, American Psycho (2000), Party Monster (2003), The Brown Bunny (2003) ve Dogville (2003) gibi çoğunlukla bağımsız sanat evi filmlerinde oyunculuk yapmaya devam etti. Sevigny, 2006'da HBO televizyon dizisi Big Love'da başrol oynadı ve 2010'da En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu dalında Altın Küre kazandı. Ayrıca Sevigny'nin iki Off-Broadway tiyatro kredisi var ve birkaç müzik videosunda rol aldı. Ayrıca, en son Manhattan'ın Açılış Töreni butiği ile birlikte birkaç gardırop koleksiyonu tasarladı.

Chloe Sevigny, născută sub numele Chloe Stevens Sevigny în data de 18 noiembrie 1974 la Darien, Connecticut, SUA, este fiica lui H. David Sevigny (care a murit de cancer în anul 1996) şi a Janinei Malinowski, poloneză-americană.

La vârsta de 18 ani, Chloe se mută într-un apartament în Brooklyn. În 1993 a fost angajată a revistei "Sassy". Fratele ei mai mare, Paul Sevigny, este un foarte cunoscut DJ la New York. De asemenea, actriţa mai deţine un apartament in East Village, Manhattan. În ultimii ani ai adolescenţei şi în primii ani ai tinereţii, Chloe a avut o relaţie amoroasă cu scenaristul şi regizorul Harmony Korine. Chloe a mai fost si model pentru "H&M". Ciudat este că în ultimul an de liceu, actriţa s-a tuns zero. În liceu era babysitter pentru Topher Grace. Actriţa a dezvăluit că pe banii făcuţi la filmările pentru producţia "Kids" (1995) a făcut o călătorie în Europa. In 2001, actriţa a refuzat un rol în "Legally Blonde" pentru care ar fi primit suma de 500.000 $.

Chloe Sevigny este descendenta aristocratului francez marchizul de Sevigne. Unul din filmele preferate este"Picnic at Hanging Rock" ce datează din anul 1975. Este fana muzicianului Steven Patrick Morrissey şi a fostei trupe de care acesta a aparţinut, şi anume "The Smiths". Chloe a participat la un concert al acestuia în toamna anului 2007 unde actriţa s-a îmbrăcat ca Jeanne D'Arc deoarece această personalitate istorică apare printre versurile solistului.

克洛伊·史蒂文斯·塞维尼（Chloë Stevens Sevigny，1974年11月18日-），美国电影女演员、时装设计师、前模特。Sevigny 在 1990 年代中期以其广泛的时尚生涯而闻名，无论是模特还是她在纽约的 Sassy 杂志的工作，该杂志当时将她称为新的“it girl”，在纽约时尚界引起了她的关注。

塞维尼在备受争议的拉里·克拉克电影《孩子们》（1995 年）中担任主角，首次亮相，她的表演获得了独立精神奖提名。在这十年中，塞维尼在广受好评的独立电影中扮演了一系列角色，这些角色奠定了塞维尼作为独立电影女王的声誉。直到 1999 年，塞维尼才因在《男孩不哭》中的第一个主流角色而获得了严重的评论界和商业认可，并因此获得了奥斯卡奖和金球奖最佳女配角提名。

塞维尼继续出演大部分独立的艺术电影，如《美国精神病人》（2000年）、《派对怪物》（2003年）、《棕色兔子》（2003年）和《狗城》（2003年）。2006 年，塞维尼在 HBO 电视连续剧《大爱》中担任主角，并因此获得了 2010 年金球奖最佳女配角奖。此外，塞维尼还拥有两部非百老汇戏剧作品，并出演了几部音乐录影带。她还设计了多个衣橱系列，最近一次是与曼哈顿的开幕式精品店合作。
data.name: 克洛伊·塞维尼

data.biography: Η Κλόι Σεβινί (Chloë Sevigny) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός. Γνωστή για τη δουλειά της σε ανεξάρτητες ταινίες, που συχνά εμφανίζονται σε αμφιλεγόμενες ή πειραματικές ταινίες, η Σεβινί είναι αποδέκτης πολλών διακρίσεων, συμπεριλαμβανομένου ενός βραβείου Χρυσής Σφαίρας, καθώς και μιας υποψηφιότητας για Όσκαρ.
data.name: Κλόι Σεβινί

data.biography:
克洛伊·史蒂文斯·塞維尼（Chloë Stevens Sevigny，1974 年 11 月 18 日-），美國電影女演員、時裝設計師、前模特。Sevigny 在 1990 年代中期以其廣泛的時尚生涯而聞名，無論是模特還是她在紐約的 Sassy 雜誌的工作，該雜誌當時將她稱為新的“it girl”，在紐約時尚界引起了她的關注。

塞維尼在備受爭議的拉里·克拉克電影《孩子們》（1995 年）中擔任主角，首次亮相，她的表演獲得了獨立精神獎提名。在這十年中，塞維尼在廣受好評的獨立電影中扮演了一系列角色，這些角色奠定了塞維尼作為獨立電影女王的聲譽。直到 1999 年，塞維尼才因在《男孩不哭》中的第一個主流角色而獲得了嚴重的評論界和商業認可，並因此獲得了奧斯卡獎和金球獎最佳女配角提名。

塞維尼繼續出演大部分獨立的藝術電影，如《美色殺人狂》（2000 年）、《派對怪物》（2003 年）、《棕色兔子》（2003 年）和《狗城》（2003 年）。2006 年，塞維尼在 HBO 電視聯續劇《大愛》中擔任主角，並因此獲得了 2010 年金球獎最佳女配角獎。此外，塞維尼還擁有兩部非百老匯戲劇作品，並出演了幾部音樂錄影帶。她還設計了多個衣櫥系列，最近一次是與曼哈頓的開幕式精品店合作。
data.name: 克洛伊·塞維尼
